_meta.purpose: Per-move vulnerability (v_hb) hurtbox extensions for Akuma's active frames - the limb that becomes hittable during a move. These are NOT in the 3rd_training_lua ROM dump (only idle/wakeup carry vulnerability boxes), so they are sourced from Baston ESN3S per-move dumps as an interim until tools/rom_extract/ backfills authoritative per-frame data from the ROM.
_meta.box_format: raw {left,width,height,bottom} (same convention as the ROM JSON); converted centered, applied to every active frame of the move
_meta.coverage: interim seed for st.LP/st.LK/st.MK; remaining moves pending ROM extraction
